headline: 3 Stocks Berkshire Hathaway Like This June
summary: Berkshire Hathaway’s Q1 2026 13F filing, dated May 15, 2026, covering positions held as of March 31, 2026, offers the cleanest read yet on how Greg Abel is steering Berkshire’s $300+ billion equity book.
